steps.t: Barmy Rootknot, the innkeeper, is at The Green Dragon in Bywater, in the Shire. Óli has requested Beakbreaker Ale, but the Ale Association plans to tr…
Óli is at Hrimbarg in the Misty Mountains, waiting for Beakbreaker Ale. You should deliver the fake Beakbreaker Ale, actually 1404 Vintage Reserve win…
